Plugin distribution of an existing engine — claims inherit from Memvid (sub-ms reads, single-file portability).
Targeted at team / enterprise deployments. Docker Compose.
46k★, 223 releases, 92 contributors. Distributed via Claude Code plugin marketplace.
Distributed via Claude Code plugin marketplace. Requires Supermemory Pro.
Benchmarks claim superiority over Mem0, LightRAG, Graphiti on multi-hop QA.
Works across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf with no runtime deps.
Claude Code hooks for automatic cross-session memory.
Zero config, no cloud, no API keys. npx @studiomeyer/local-memory-mcp .
Free tier covers 1k memories / ~28k queries per month. One-click Cloudflare deploy.
Self-compresses aging memories to address context-window pressure.
Cross-tool memory passport: write in Claude Desktop, read in Cursor.
Donated to Linux Foundation's AAIF (Dec 2025). Adopted by 20,000+ repos. Read by Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Factory.ai.
Convention loaded via .clinerules ; also an MCP server variant. Pattern, not built-in.
Path-scoped rules apply only when matching files in context.
Vendor-supported across VS Code, JetBrains, GitHub.com chat.
Notable: only editor that explicitly reads competitors' files as aliases.
Free with Apple device. Apple Intelligence requires iPhone 16 / M-series Mac. iOS 27 adds pluggable model selection (Claude / Gemini / ChatGPT).
Free; Plus $8/mo; Team $50/mo flat (up to 25 members).
Pro $8.99/mo (annual); Premium $17.99/mo (annual) with unlimited PDF OCR + full AI.
Free 30 AI requests/mo, 100 notes; Starter $8/mo; Standard $16/mo.
ima.copilot 2.0 (Oct 2025) introduced Task Mode with report and podcast generation; high-accuracy recall of prior work context across sessions.
$50 "Explorer's Edition." 160+ hour (7-day) battery — claimed industry-first. Acquired by Amazon (announced July 2025).
$11M raised April 23, 2026 ($9M seed Abstract Ventures + BoxGroup; $2M pre-seed Topology + Betaworks).
$99 launch / now $129. Began shipping summer 2025 (delayed from Q1). Drew significant backlash from a $11k NYC billboard campaign late 2025.
$43M raised at $250M valuation (May 2025). "AI notepad for back-to-back meetings." Free (25 lifetime), Individual $18/mo, Business $14/user/mo, Enterprise $35+/user/mo.
Rebranded from Rewind (April 2024). Acquired by Meta December 2025.
Hardware $89. Entire stack open-source on GitHub (BasedHardware/omi). 24h+ continuous capture; users choose LLM provider.
Free 300 min/mo, Pro $10/user/mo (annual), Business $20/user/mo. Real-time transcription in English, French, Spanish.
"World's No.1 AI note-taking brand." Hardware $169; free 300 min/month. ISO 27001, SOC II, HIPAA certified. Up to 20-hour recording battery.
Free 5 meetings/mo; Pro $15/user/mo; Enterprise $22.50; Enterprise+ $29.75. Engagement analytics differentiator.
$23M Series A (March 2026). "Mouse for voice" positioning. Ring preorder $249–$299; shipping targeted summer 2026.

Plugin layer on top of Memvid — adds another moving part for the same underlying engine.

Claude Code plugin packaging of Memvid (see Dedicated memory layers). Wraps the Memvid .mv2 single-file store as a slash-command-installable plugin so per-project memory becomes a git-committable file inside the repo.
Claude Code plugin that bundles Memvid as the per-project memory store; git-committable single-file.

Persistent file-based memory at ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/ with a MEMORY.md index plus typed memory files (user / feedback / project / reference). Loaded into context across sessions.
Per-project automatic memory built into the runtime — no plugin install, no external store, no extra prompts.

FastAPI server. RBAC + API-key auth, encryption, backup/recovery, embedding pipeline with deduplication. Only server in this list with role-based access control over pgvector.

Hooks into Claude Code's session lifecycle; compresses tool outputs into ~500-token observations via Claude's agent SDK. SQLite + FTS5 with optional Chroma vector. "Endless Mode" compresses in-flight to extend session length. Captures what the agent did , not just what the user typed.
OSS plugin that adds auto-memory + indexing without sending data to Anthropic's cloud — strongest privacy posture for Claude Code memory.

MCP server that brings Cognee's ECL pipeline into any MCP-compatible agent.

SQLite + FTS5; agent decides what to save (not firehose capture). Single Go binary, no CGO, no Node/Python/Docker dependencies. HTTP API + MCP + CLI + TUI; optional cloud sync with local-source-of-truth.
Static Go binary, agent-agnostic — works across Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex without runtime deps.

Tracks how facts change over time; maintains provenance; supports prescribed and learned ontology. Bi-temporal edges (when known vs when valid). Only server that distinguishes "fact learned" from "fact true."
MCP exposure of Graphiti's bi-temporal KG gives any agent contradiction-aware memory; first-party vendor support.

World (facts), Experiences (agent actions), Opinion (beliefs with confidence scores), Observation (mental models). Entity resolution ("Alice" and "my coworker Alice" same node). Mimics human recall topology.
MCP server for Hindsight memory layer; gives any MCP agent access to Vectorize-tuned retrieval.

SQLite + FTS5 + BM25 ranking. Stores learnings, decisions with reasoning and alternatives , entities, observations. Loads context from last 3 sessions. Only server that captures why a decision was made + alternatives considered.
Local-only MCP memory server — no cloud round-trip; fastest possible memory ops.

MCP server exposing graph-shaped memory — closer to Graphiti's model with smaller footprint.
Stable local fork of official MCP memory
